scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && npm run build:docs
scripts.db:reset:dev: echo '⚠️  Wiping local D1...' && rm -rf .wrangler/state/v3/d1 && npm run db:migrate:dev
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run build:web && npm run db:migrate:staging && wrangler deploy --minify --env staging
scripts.deploy:staging:preview: npm run build:web && npm run db:migrate:staging && wrangler versions upload --minify --env staging
scripts.deploy:production: npm run build:web && npm run db:migrate:production && wrangler deploy --minify --env production
scripts.db:migrate:dev: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply entix-app-development --local --env development
scripts.db:migrate:staging: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply entix-app-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:production: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply entix-app-production --remote --env production
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm run test:api" "npm run test:web"
scripts.test:web: cd web && npm install --prefer-offline && npm run test:run
scripts.typecheck: concurrently "npm run typecheck:api" "npm run typecheck:web" "npm run check"
